name: Arcturus
text: This card can only be damaged by the attacking creature’s base attack and modifier.

condition.text: Damage is from magic increases, creature effects, bonuses, multipliers, DOT, or other non-base sources

effects.value: Only the attacking creature’s base Atk Dice Rolls and printed Modifier can damage this card

duration.text: While this card remains on the field
